prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5792cb4d`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 package for `5792cb4d`. The rule is: keep the same 4-connected colored snake on the `8` background, but reverse the color sequence from one endpoint to the other. I used the `opus` hint as a starting hypothesis and discarded the `sonnet` hint because its anti-diagonal reflection claim contradicts the official examples; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5792cb4d/notes.md#L1).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5792cb4d/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5792cb4d/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5792cb4d/generator.py#L1). The verifier reconstructs the unique path order from the two endpoints and repaints the same cells with reversed colors; the generator stays on-family with fixed `10x10` sky-blue grids, a single non-self-touching interior snake, and repeated colors from the observed palette. No new reusable primitive was needed.

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `pass 5792cb4d: 3/3 official examples passed`
- Generated examples: `pass 5792cb4d: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5792cb4d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5792cb4d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5792cb4d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5792cb4d/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5792cb4d/previews/preview_03.png).
